import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { loadMicroApp } from 'qiankun';
import type { MicroApp } from 'qiankun';
import './App.css';

function normalizePath(pathname: string): string {
  if (pathname.length > 1 && pathname.endsWith('/')) {
    return pathname.slice(0, -1);
  }

  return pathname || '/';
}

function resolveActiveAppByPath(pathname: string): 'sub-app' | null {
  const normalizedPath = normalizePath(pathname);

  if (normalizedPath === '/sub-app') {
    return 'sub-app';
  }

  return null;
}

function App() {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const microAppRef = useRef<MicroApp | null>(null);
  const [activeApp, setActiveApp] = useState<'sub-app' | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const syncAppFromPath = () => {
      setActiveApp(resolveActiveAppByPath(window.location.pathname));
    };

    syncAppFromPath();
    window.addEventListener('popstate', syncAppFromPath);

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('popstate', syncAppFromPath);
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const targetPath = activeApp ? '/sub-app' : '/';
    const currentPath = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);
    const appFromCurrentPath = resolveActiveAppByPath(currentPath);

    if (activeApp === null && appFromCurrentPath !== null) {
      return;
    }

    if (targetPath === currentPath) {
      return;
    }

    window.history.pushState({ activeApp }, '', targetPath);
  }, [activeApp]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let isUnmounted = false;

    if (activeApp !== 'sub-app') {
      setLoading(false);
      setError(null);
      microAppRef.current?.unmount();
      microAppRef.current = null;
      return;
    }

    if (!containerRef.current) return;

    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    microAppRef.current = loadMicroApp({
      name: 'sub-app',
      entry: '//localhost:7100',
      container: containerRef.current,
      props: {
        qiankunVersion: 'rc',
      },
    });

    microAppRef.current.mountPromise
      .then(() => {
        if (!isUnmounted) {
          setLoading(false);
        }
      })
      .catch((err: unknown) => {
        if (!isUnmounted) {
          setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load micro app');
          setLoading(false);
        }
      });

    return () => {
      isUnmounted = true;
      microAppRef.current?.unmount();
      microAppRef.current = null;
    };
  }, [activeApp]);

  return (
    <div className="main-app">
      <header className="main-app-header">
        <div>
          <h1>Qiankun Main App</h1>
          <p>统一现代化主应用 · URL 可直达子应用</p>
        </div>
        <div className="header-actions">
          <button
            type="button"
            className={activeApp === null ? 'tab-button active' : 'tab-button'}
            onClick={() => setActiveApp(null)}
          >
            首页
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className={activeApp === 'sub-app' ? 'tab-button active' : 'tab-button'}
            onClick={() => setActiveApp('sub-app')}
          >
            子应用
          </button>
        </div>
      </header>
      <main className="main-app-content">
        {activeApp === null ? (
          <section className="home-card">
            <h2>欢迎使用 create-qiankun</h2>
            <p>点击“子应用”进入挂载页，或者直接访问 <code>/sub-app</code> 进行深链直达。</p>
            <button type="button" className="primary-button" onClick={() => setActiveApp('sub-app')}>
              进入子应用
            </button>
          </section>
        ) : null}

        {loading && <div className="loading">Loading micro app...</div>}
        {error && <div className="error">Error: {error}</div>}
        <div ref={containerRef} id="micro-app-container" />
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
